label: Target Mapping (Non-Target)
description: Maps a non-target protein (e.g. RPS6KB2) to confirm compound selectivity — verifying the lead candidate does not significantly bind off-target kinases.

defaultInputs.name: Lead Compound
defaultInputs.tooltip: Lead compound identified from the primary bioactivity filter.

defaultOutputs.name: Sequence Similarity
defaultOutputs.tooltip: % sequence identity to the primary target RPS6KB1.

defaultOutputs.name: PDB ID
defaultOutputs.tooltip: PDB structure identifier for the non-target protein.

defaultOutputs.name: Protein Structure
defaultOutputs.tooltip: 3D structure URL of the non-target protein.

configSchema.label: Non-Target Protein
configSchema.tooltip: Specify the off-target protein to test selectivity against.
